---
title: "Contact"
---

# Contact

If you would like to connect, collaborate, or discuss opportunities, feel free to reach out.

📧 **Email**  
yinhang779354683@gmail.com

📍 **Location**  
Los Angeles, California

## Professional Profiles

- GitHub: https://github.com/HangYin2004
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/hang-yin-5ab35a339/

## Resume

You can download my resume below:

[Download Resume](resume.pdf)
